title: McpChatAppConfig
description: Configuration for the MCP Chat Application. The LLM provider and credentials are configured at the platform level via `llmConfiguration`; this app only governs chat behavior.

systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.
